title: Bioengineering (English) Master's Program Mission and Vision
content:
Bioengineering (English) Master's Program Mission and Vision

Mission

The main mission of Üsküdar University Bioengineering (English) Master's Program is to provide education with the capacity to create scientific discoveries and new technological inventions by gathering up engineering and life sciences.

Vision

The main vision of Üsküdar University Bioengineering (English) Master's Program is to train senior bioengineers who will contribute and lead the developments in the field of bioengineering, who are open to new developments and who can compete with their equivalents.
